title: Major reasons adults live in a multigenerational household

source.name: Financial Issues Top the List of Reasons U.S. Adults Live in Multigenerational Homes

notes: Illustrative. Share of adults citing each reason as a major factor; younger adults (25-39) living with a parent are the 57 percent figure. Caregiving figure covers all multigenerational households (25 percent adult caregiving + 12 percent child care).
